items.markdown:
Salt wall panels are `decorative and functional wellness features made from authentic Himalayan pink salt, typically used in saunas, spas, and home interiors` . These panels are designed to create a soothing ambiance through a warm amber glow and are often sought for their potential health benefits, such as air purification and stress reduction.[[1]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels#:~:text=Benefits%20of%20Himalayan%20salt%20wall,phones%2C%20computers%2C%20TV's%2C%20etc)[[2]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/blogs/news/salt-panels-everything-you-need-to-know#:~:text=What%20is%20a%20salt%20panel,just%20putting%20together%20salt%20bricks.)[[3]](https://qimassageandnaturalhealingspa.com/5-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-wall-therapy-for-wellness/#:~:text=Health%20Benefit%20%231:%20Improved%20Air,a%20natural%2C%20beautiful%20air%20filter.)[[4]](https://qimassageandnaturalhealingspa.com/5-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-wall-therapy-for-wellness/#:~:text=Health%20Benefit%20%231:%20Improved%20Air,a%20natural%2C%20beautiful%20air%20filter.)

Core Benefits & Functions

- **Air Purification** : When heated, Himalayan salt panels naturally emit negative ions that help neutralize pollutants, allergens, and electromagnetic "smog" from electronic devices.
- **Respiratory Support** : Passive halotherapy from these panels may assist individuals with asthma, allergies, or chronic sinus issues by clearing airways.
- **Stress & Mood** : The soft, warm light and ion release are believed to boost serotonin levels, promoting relaxation and better sleep cycles.
- **Aesthetic Appeal** : Each panel is unique, featuring natural crystal patterns and hues ranging from light pink to deep orange.[[1]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Pink-Salt-Tiles-x4/dp/B0F88QQ24Z#:~:text=Experience%20the%20Power%20of%20Nature's,glow%20and%20ion-rich%20environment.)[[2]](https://www.blacktaisaltco.com/products/large-himalayan-salt-rock-wall-panel)[[3]](https://www.saltability.com/pages/himalayan-salt-walls#:~:text=Waterside%20Day%20Spa%2C%20Steamboat%20Springs,to%20purify%20the%20circulating%20air.)[[4]](https://qimassageandnaturalhealingspa.com/5-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-wall-therapy-for-wellness/#:~:text=Health%20Benefit%20%231:%20Improved%20Air,a%20natural%2C%20beautiful%20air%20filter.)[[5]](https://cedar-sense.com/product/himalayan-salt-wall-panels/#:~:text=%F0%9F%8C%AC%EF%B8%8F%20Improved%20air%20quality%20through,clearer%20breathing%20during%20heat%20sessions)[[6]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/blogs/news/salt-panels-everything-you-need-to-know#:~:text=Relieve%20respiratory%20and%20skin%20problems,skin%20infections%2C%20and%20seasonal%20allergies.)[[7]](https://vocal.media/humans/major-benefits-of-salt-bricks-for-commercial-wellness-spaces#:~:text=The%20soft%20glow%20of%20salt,dining%20atmospheres%20to%20the%20guests.)

Common Product Types

- **Interlocking Panels** : These pre-fabricated sections, such as the [[Himalayan Salt Wall Panels from Tekna Store](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:10303624185493113209,headlineOfferDocid:10911879095790173964,productDocid:10911879095790173964&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjTxImn16KTAxXwEzQIHWzFFUUQxa4PegQIBxAD) ](https://mysaunaworld.com/products/himalayan-salt-wall-panels) , are designed for easy, seamless installation.
- **DIY Wall Kits** : Complete sets like the 6x8 ft Himalayan Salt Wall Kit on Etsy include bricks, specialized adhesive, and LED strips for full-scale projects.
- **Modular "Snap-In" Systems** : Options like the [Cedar Sense Salt Wall Panels](https://cedar-sense.com/product/himalayan-salt-wall-panels/) use patent-pending mounting brackets for fast, adhesive-free installation.
- **Backlit vs. Unlit** : Most panels can be fitted with LED backlighting to enhance the visual effect and ion release through gentle heat.[[1]](https://cedar-sense.com/product/himalayan-salt-wall-panels/#:~:text=%F0%9F%8C%AC%EF%B8%8F%20Improved%20air%20quality%20through,clearer%20breathing%20during%20heat%20sessions)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9070965088269163225&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10911879095790173964&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8874490827105665785&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8874490827105665785&ibp=oshop)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7140153925007176577,catalogid:12751530502885551510,gpcid:5809168640582224961&ibp=oshop)[[7]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:12021630070328062084&ibp=oshop)[[8]](https://www.alibaba.com/showroom/salt-panels.html#:~:text=Rock%20Salt%20Panels:%20These%20panels,a%20minimalist%20and%20straightforward%20aesthetic.)

Installation & Maintenance

- **Mounting** : Panels can be screwed directly into a stable, moisture-resistant substrate (like cement board) or mounted using proprietary framing systems.
- **Adhesives** : If using bricks, a salt-specific, non-toxic adhesive (like Saltite) is required to ensure a secure bond without reacting with the salt.
- **Environment** : While ideal for saunas, panels should be protected from direct water or excessive humidity to prevent "sweating" or melting.
- **Care** : Maintenance is minimal, generally requiring only occasional dusting with a dry or slightly damp cloth.[[1]](https://am-finn.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/HIMALAYAN_SALT_PANELS_INSTALLATION_GUIDE_AM-FINN.pdf)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8874490827105665785&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8678970336007433490,catalogid:3733075406373319262,gpcid:14984007211196227176,mid:576462880002988438&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://himalayansalterz.com/blogs/himalayan-salt-wall/salt-tiles-for-wall-the-ultimate-guide-to-selection-installation-and-maintenance#:~:text=You%20must%20check%20that%20your,sealant%20into%20the%20tile%20gaps.)[[5]](https://sunvalleysalt.com/blogs/news/salt-panels-everything-you-need-to-know#:~:text=What%20is%20a%20salt%20panel,just%20putting%20together%20salt%20bricks.)[[6]](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/blogs/himalayan-pink-salt-benefits/himalayan-salt-bricks-installation-process-and-maintenance-tips#:~:text=of%20using%20them.-,Installing%20Salt%20Bricks%20in%20Your%20Home,the%20benefits%20of%20these%20bricks.)[[7]](https://vocal.media/humans/major-benefits-of-salt-bricks-for-commercial-wellness-spaces#:~:text=The%20soft%20glow%20of%20salt,dining%20atmospheres%20to%20the%20guests.)

Top Recommended Products

[![Himalayan Salt Wall Panel Kit for 6x8 ft, including Bricks, Glue, Map, LED strips](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03152153-4353-0139-0000-5c794f9158af:4)
Himalayan Salt Wall Panel Kit for 6x8 ft, including Bricks, Glue, Map, LED strips $1,610.00 Etsy - Seller](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:5714897565032741086,headlineOfferDocid:8874490827105665785,productDocid:8874490827105665785&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjTxImn16KTAxXwEzQIHWzFFUUQgLcPegQICxAC) 

- According to the seller on Etsy , this is a **complete system** including 204 full bricks, LED lights, and a placement map for professional alignment.

- Cedar Sense offers these with a **patent-pending snap-in system** , making them removable for easy maintenance or relocation.

[![Natural Himalayan Salt Panel 22''x22'' For Salt Rooms And Halotherapy](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03152153-4353-0139-0000-5c794f9158af:5)
Natural Himalayan Salt Panel 22''x22'' For Salt Rooms And Halotherapy $95.00 eBay](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:7313588491342391310,headlineOfferDocid:314177284764759260,productDocid:314177284764759260&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjTxImn16KTAxXwEzQIHWzFFUUQgLcPegQICxAP) 

- Reviewers on [SALT Chamber](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=39eX0102x5o) highlight their **versatility** , as they can be cut into custom shapes or logos for commercial branding.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8874490827105665785&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:8874490827105665785&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7140153925007176577,catalogid:12751530502885551510,gpcid:5809168640582224961&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=39eX0102x5o&t=14)

Are you planning to install these panels in a **high-heat environment** like a sauna, or as a **decorative feature** in a standard living space?
